Notice And Motion To Reclassify Case To Unlimited
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Mack, Esq. 415-392-8920 for INTERVENOR JOSE SOTO.
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

INTERVENOR JOSE SOTO'S Motion To Reclassify Limited civil Case to Unlimited Civil Case.

Plaintiff in intervention Jose Soto's motion to reclassify the case as an unlimited civil case is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
